race.comment: TRICKSTER (12) is on debut today with Pike in the saddle, showing good ability at the trials this time in. Pike partnered him earlier in the season at the trials and reunites for his raceday debut. Finds a winnable race today and can make an immediate impact. MAGNIFICENT MALCOM (5) flew home fresh before leading last start at Bunbury last week, finishing 2L off the winner. Out to 1300m now, but Watson reunites and the visors go on for the first time. He makes plenty of appeal in this suitable race. COUNTERSUNK (1) flew home last start over this trip at Belmont, finishing 2.2L off the winner as a $41 chance. A better draw this time suits though, as does the drop back in distance. Can make his presence felt once again. FREE RIDE (3) is third-up here and can put his best foot forward today. FIBONACCI SEQUENCE (9) was solid in his most recent trial and can't be left out of calculations.
